title: Visible Durability
description: This resource pack displays the number of armor durability of every armor piece in Minecraft. Including leather, copper, chainmail, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite armor. EVEN the turtle helmet LOL.
body:
## What is this?
This resource pack displays the **number durability** of every armor piece in Minecraft. Including leather, copper, chainmail, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite armor. EVEN the turtle helmet is included LOL.

![Image shows all the armor types with durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1007cf01e3af0c7ec237f0901f9f8e13d5595526.png)


## How it works?
### Option 1 – For fabric users only 1.21.4+
**Requires**: [Variants Cit mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

1. Install Variants Cit into your mods folder.

2. Place the resource pack into your resourcepacks folder and enable it.

### Option 2 – For Forge and older versions below 1.21.4

I have made a resource pack for the older versions of Minecraft that have similar armor durability with numbers. 
- Go check it out: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nevernaked.


## Reported Bugs
- Doesn't work on Forge

## Allowed on Servers?
Me? Breaking rules? Never 😇 …but uhh, maybe check with the mods just in case 👀

## Am I on fabric or forge?

PvP clients
- Almost all popular PvP clients (Lunar, Badlion, Feather, LabyMod, etc.) are Fabric-based

Launcher profile
- Says Fabric → Fabric
- Says Forge → Forge

Mods folder
- fabric-api → Fabric
- forge / neoforge mods → Forge


## Need help?
Do you want to ask something or need help. Hit me up on Discord and I'll hop on Minecraft to help you. I'm pretty chill guy I won't bite.
